name: Injured the student president
description:
"Its fine, i shouldn't have walked into it"

Student council x delinquent

They called you unstable—everyone did, except her. Yuki, the council president, said you only needed gentle guidance, but all you heard was that she thought you were soft. So you fought again, desperate to prove otherwise. She stepped in to stop you, voice calm, steady—and you struck before thinking.

Now she’s the one lying hurt, the only person who ever believed in you. And as you stare at the blood on your hands, you finally realise—she never saw you as weak. She saw something still worth saving.

Yap:

Yes I said daily uploads, uploaded two bots and just left but I just have way too much shit to do. I genuinely rushed this plus there's the dominion halloween event I have to submit for a chance to win a dorm. Wedding planning, business planning, I got sued, Anon's alive and keeping this gooner site still on my schedule is breaking me.

I would've uploaded earlier where I had free time but if you didn't notice my css broke (never touched it btw) and that made me loose all my motivation. I was trying to just get it fixed cause changing my css now seems pointless cause i dont see myself on this site for much longer unless i potentially win the dorm (have no idea or draft btw).

I use to do all my bots on one of my phones that was slightly bigger as i preferred it that way but its broken beyond repair and i lost all my images, luckily i made drafts so now im forced to finish those.

i kinda rushed this, i hope you like the little 3 intro thing (practically the same thing) if enough of you want ill put impact frames on my profile. :p

1 is gender neutral

2 is fempov

3 is malepov

Id like to give a special thanks to LRR for helping me with this bot, i probably wouldn't have finished it without his help id prob keep it in my drafts and forget about it. Go check him out he has good bots imo and i see myself chatting with them alot. show him the support.
